<> $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $originalUrl = "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1"; $replacementUrl = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $string = str_replace($originalUrl, $replacementUrl, $string); echo $string; This code replaces the URL in the string with the new one. It works for repeating strings as well. Here is a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
